sources.title: The Child 1977
sources.description: A newly hired housekeeper arrives to her employer's house in the countryside and slowly discovers that the only child in the house hides a deadly secret.

metadata.Plot: A newly hired house-keeper in a secluded area is alarmed to discover that her boss's eleven-year-old daughter is using her supernatural powers to take revenge on the people she holds responsible for her mother's death, with the aid of her flesh-eating zombie 'friends'.
metadata.Actors: Laurel Barnett, Rosalie Cole, Frank Janson
